# Decisions Log

> Each entry records a decision, its context, and why it was made. This helps agents (and humans) understand the project's history without re-asking questions.

---

## Format

```
### YYYY-MM-DD — Decision Title

**Context:** Why this came up.
**Decision:** What was decided.
**Reason:** Why this option was chosen over alternatives.
**Impact:** What this affects going forward.
```

---

### {{date}} — CopilotForge scaffolded this project

**Decision:** CopilotForge generated the initial structure with agents, skills, memory, and cookbook recipes.
**Reason:** Starting from a structured scaffold is faster than building from scratch. The generated structure follows CopilotForge conventions so agents can immediately collaborate.
**Impact:** All agents, skills, and memory files follow the CopilotForge format. See `FORGE.md` for the full inventory.
